name: property managers processing 5–15 rent reports/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 rent reports/month, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent and delayed rent reporting leads to cash flow gaps.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent and delayed rent reporting leads to cash flow gaps.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 rent reports/month, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
